response.global_analysis: The video consists of a dialogue sequence followed by a vocal performance of 'Darling Dance'. The audio phonetically matches the Japanese on-screen text and the reference JSON for the most part, although some verses in the second half of the song differ from the reference JSON, requiring reliance on on-screen text and audio. I have synchronized timestamps to the vocal onset and discarded the dialogue intro which has no vocal speech until the first subtitle line at 00:30.

subtitles.original: キミのびっくりした顔、ほんっとに可愛いねぇ～
subtitles.english: your startled face is so cute~

subtitles.original: これって、ずっと楽しみにしてたんじゃないのぉ～？
subtitles.english: Wasn't this what you were waiting for?

subtitles.original: だって、推しと直接お話しできるんだよぉ～？
subtitles.english: To be able to talk to your oshi~

subtitles.original: あれれ～？なんで戻るボタンなんか何回も押してるのぉ～？
subtitles.english: Hmm, why the frantic button pressing dear?

subtitles.original: もしがして……オリーがこうやってお話しするの、イヤだったのかな～？
subtitles.english: Don't tell me you actually dislike this kind of interaction~

subtitles.original: え～っ？なんでスマホの電源切っちゃうのぉ～？
subtitles.english: Aww why'd you turn off the phone?

subtitles.original: キミってさ……オリーと話すの、ほんとうにイヤだったんだぁ～？
subtitles.english: You really don't want to talk to me huh~

subtitles.original: これからもっと楽しくなるよぉ～！
subtitles.english: The fun is just about to begin~

subtitles.original: ダーリン～
subtitles.english: Darling~
